programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a body is found in an alley with the Death tarot card, Murdoch suspects it's linked to a contested psychic event.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When Crabtree journeys north to intercept his fugitive father, he finds a dead policeman and community of scallywags.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When Murdoch investigates the bizarre death of a science professor, it appears the weapon may have been a swarm of bees.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Watts is abducted after he and Murdoch go north on a treasure hunt to find stolen Incan gold and a murder.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch suspects the sudden death of a man at a gospel revival is connected to a fiery charlatan preacher and nun.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and Brackenreid are enlisted by spy Terrence Meyers to protect a prime ministerial candidate from assassins.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull looks to select jurors who can empathize with an individual's need for personal privacy when he helps Marissa's friend sue a notable philanthropic businessman for abusing him as a child.

programme.title: Serving Sara
programme.desc: When Sara (Elizabeth Hurley) is served divorce papers while she is in New York, she is stunned. Not about to lose the fortune she amassed with her self-serving Texan husband, she makes an offer to her process server, Joe (Matthew Perry), that sets them off on a wild trip across the country.

programme.title: Kill Switch
programme.desc: A psychopathic killer is ravaging Memphis, Tennesse by murdering young women and Detective Jacob Stillwell is on the case. Known as the resident tough cop due to his aggressive tactics, he gets knocked sideways when his girlfriend becomes one of the murder victims. With his partner, Storm Anderson, in tow, Jacob casts the rules aside and infiltrates the seedy criminal underworld of the city looking to avenge his lover's death and put an end to the killings.

programme.title: Surviving Love
programme.desc: A couple decides to settle their divorce in a civilized manner without lawyers, which brings complications.

programme.title: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: Emma (Uma Thurman), a radio host, is about to be married to Richard (Colin Firth), her perfect match. But right before her wedding, she learns she's already married to Patrick (Jeffrey Dean Morgan), a charming but irresponsible fireman. Furthermore, Patrick has a secret: he has arranged this little trick because Emma advised Patrick's ex-fiancee to end their relationship. However, Patrick may find that the trick is on him, for he soon begins to fall in love with his uptight adversary.

programme.title: A Dark Place
programme.desc: When a young boy goes missing in a sleepy backwoods town, a local sanitation truck driver, Donald, plays detective, embarking on a precarious and obsessive investigation.

programme.title: Sophie's Choice
programme.desc: A Holocaust survivor's tragic past.

programme.title: Serving Sara
programme.desc: A process server tries to serve an elusive female target.

programme.title: Sliding Doors
programme.desc: After personal and professional setbacks, a woman experiences an alternate reality.

programme.title: The Rebound
programme.desc: In New York City, a single mom captivates her new neighbor, a much younger man.

programme.title: Predestination
programme.desc: A riveting adventure through time centered on a secret government time traveling agency designed to prevent future killers and terrorists from committing their crimes. Edited for TV

programme.title: First Daughter
programme.desc: A female Secret Service agent (Hemingway) goes against protocol to save the U.S. president from an assassination attempt.

programme.title: First Target
programme.desc: The Secret Service attempts to prevent an elaborately plotted assassination attempt on the President.

programme.title: First Shot
programme.desc: A veteran Secret Service agent must thwart an assassin's plan to kill both her and the President.

programme.title: Home Invasion
programme.desc: A botched robbery turns into a hostage crisis as a gang of armed criminals holds a woman and four children captive while police surround the house.

programme.title: The Long Gray Line
programme.desc: The prospect of a forced retirement prompts a longtime athletic trainer to recall how he became a West Point institution.

programme.title: The Bitter Tea Of General Yen
programme.desc: The idealistic fiancée of an American missionary becomes enmeshed in a plot to overthrow a powerful Chinese warlord.

programme.title: The Admirable Crichton
programme.desc: Based on the James Barrie classic, THE ADMIRABLE CRICHTON tells the story of an English butler who, shipwrecked with his employers, resourcefully leads them in their attempts to survive.

programme.title: Scandal Sheet
programme.desc: A newspaper editor's efforts to end his ex-wife's blackmail attempt become the focus of an investigative story by his ambitious protégé.

programme.title: The Cockleshell Heroes
programme.desc: Two British Royal Marine officers lead a daring commando raid on the coast of Nazi-occupied France.

programme.title: The Road To Wellville
programme.desc: Presiding over the renowned Battle Creek Sanitarium is the visionary cornflake inventor and health-craze huckster Dr. John Harvey Kellogg (Hopkins). Seeking to improve their health – and their marriage – are Eleanor (Fonda), Kellogg's spellbound devotee, and Will (Broderick), her reluctant but devoted husband. What doesn't kill them in this spa/hospital/grand hotel will only make them stronger as they make their way through an obstacle course of sexual temptations, mechanical contraptions and dietary breakthroughs. Filled with outrageous methodology and hilarious hijinks, this "sumptuously photographed turn-of-the-century comedy with a fine cast" (San Francisco Chronicle) will make you double over ... with laughter!

programme.title: Welcome Home, Roxy Carmichael
programme.desc: A small town prepares for the homecoming of superstar Roxy Carmichael, as does a young outsider, who believes Roxy is her mother.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins and Ann-Margret star in this thriller about a ventriloquist whose dummy seems to have a mind of its own.

programme.title: Sliding Doors
programme.desc: The split-second moments that can take a life down one path instead of another form the tantalizing "what if?" in this delightful romantic comedy starring Gwyneth Paltrow.

programme.title: Inland Empire
programme.desc: As an actress begins to adopt the persona of her character in a film, her world becomes nightmarish.

programme.title: The Foreigner
programme.desc: A humble businessman with a buried past seeks justice when his daughter is killed in an act of terrorism.

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: An insurance salesman/ex-cop is caught up in a life-threatening conspiracy during his daily commute home.

programme.title: Rambo
programme.desc: When a group of aid workers disappears, John Rambo accompanies a group of mercenaries on a rescue mission.

programme.title: Rambo: Last Blood
programme.desc: Rambo must confront his past and unearth his ruthless combat skills to exact revenge in a final mission.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: A fighter struggling to deal with a tragic loss rescues a Chinese girl being targeted by the Russian mafia.

programme.title: Space Ranger
programme.desc: The Space Ranger program, set up to protect humans from intergalactic threats in the future, is opened back up when a new threat arrives on Earth, threatening to destroy humanity once and for all.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Master Z: Ip Man Legacy
programme.desc: Defeated by Master Ip, martial arts expert Cheung Tin Chi tries to lead a normal life in Hong Kong until triad leaders draw him back into fighting.

programme.title: Hydra
programme.desc: While working as a chef in Tokyo, a retired assassin becomes drawn into a brutal death game.

programme.title: A Janitor
programme.desc: Fukumi is a high school janitor whose father was a gangster. He works at the school as a janitor instead of belonging to the gang so he can watch out for Yui, the daughter of his deceased father's brother Majima Yoshiki.

programme.title: The Foggy Mountain
programme.desc: A fearless martial-arts master seeks revenge for the murder of his wife.

programme.title: The Golden Cane Warrior
programme.desc: When an aging martial arts master chooses two of her meeker students to be her successors, two older students steal her mystical cane and pursue their rivals.

programme.title: FBI: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: Best Friend From Heaven
programme.desc: When her dog is killed, Tara cancels her wedding. But her dog's ghost and her small town have a surprise.

programme.title: A Match for the Prince
programme.desc: A matchmaker risks falling for a real-life prince before his royal wedding date.

programme.title: The Soulmate Search
programme.desc: Lindsay and Will bond after agreeing the dating service that matched them has made a mistake.

programme.title: Desperate Hours
programme.desc: A man kidnaps two girls in Oregon triggering the Amber Alert system throughout many surrounding states.

programme.title: Call Her King
programme.desc: After sentencing a notorious gangster to death, Judge Jaeda King must rely on her wits, strength and skill when her courtroom is taken over by force by the prisoner's brother.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Sacrifice
programme.desc: Mike tries to get out of the drug trade to save his little sister, Angel, and leaves her with John (Cuba Gooding Jr.), an undercover cop. Mike is killed, and the drug lords kidnap Angel, forcing John to use all of his skills to save the innocent girl.

programme.title: Animal 2
programme.desc: James "Animal" Allen (Ving Rhames) took the fall for the crimes of his older son (Vicellous Shannon) and is now serving a life term at Folsom Prison. When his younger son, James Jr. (K.C. Collins), is framed for murder, Allen refuses to let two men from the same family submit to life imprisonment for crimes they didn't commit. When he learns that James Jr. was set up by someone at the prison, he resolves to win his son's freedom. To do this, he must return to his violent brawler roots.

programme.title: A Secret Lie in Love
programme.desc: Clarice and Chase Scott have the perfect suburban life on the outside. However, their marriage that was built on passion, has become a battlefield of deceit, infidelity, and betrayal. Clarice finds solace in the arms of another man, while Chase’s greed seems to unravel everything they’ve built. Will their marriage survive?

programme.title: He Killed My Sister
programme.desc: When Malorie's sister, Monica, disappears, everyone around her tells her to grieve and move on. Determined to bring her justice, Malorie embarks on a search for the truth. But when she meets Tyriq, his motives may not be as pure as they seem.

programme.title: Repay it in Blood
programme.desc: Ten years after a robbery left their sister dead and their father broken, prosecutor Larissa and her sister Maritza, a top trauma nurse, are done waiting for justice. But just as the sisters begin targeting the crew responsible for that bloody night, the truth becomes deadlier than they anticipated.

programme.title: Troublesome
programme.desc: Veteran homicide detective Michael reluctantly partners with rookie Derrick. Witnessing a double homicide, they survive a deadly chase, but Derrick is wounded. The suspects are linked to the kingpin, who retaliates by ordering murders across the city. As chaos erupts, the FBI joins the case, revealing the kingpin's identity. Michael finds a weak link, offering a chance to finally catch him.

programme.title: Unintended Consequences
programme.desc: A self-absorbed and ill-equipped father struggles to reconnect with his estranged and embittered son following his discovery of his affair with another woman. Wanting to defend his mother’s honor, his son decides to seek revenge on the mistress.

programme.title: 3-Headed Shark Attack
programme.desc: Nature's greatest killing machine is three times as deadly when a mutated shark threatens a cruise ship.

programme.title: AVH: Alien vs. Hunter
programme.desc: A galactic hunter chases the most dangerous alien in the galaxy to Earth. Humans are caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: 5-Headed Shark Attack
programme.desc: A monster 5-Headed Shark terrorizes the beaches of Puerto Rico, endangering the once peaceful island paradise.

programme.title: Avengers Grimm: Time Wars
programme.desc: When Rumpelstiltskin tries to take over Earth, The Avengers Grimm must track him through time to defeat him.

programme.title: Avengers Grimm: Time Wars
programme.desc: When Rumpelstiltskin tries to take over Earth, The Avengers Grimm must track him through time to defeat him.

programme.title: Ghosthouse
programme.desc: A group of unlikely companions receive a radio call leading to a deserted house with a grisly past. After exploring the house, the group makes the foolish decision to split up, leading to a trail of death and destruction as the house unleashes its deadly past. Along the way expect severed heads, exploding light bulbs, demonic clown dolls, and creepy children. The clown doll is the main evil force from the film; the director of a funeral home stole it out of a child's coffin to give to his own daughter, leading to angry spirits possessing both the girl and the clown doll.

programme.title: The House By the Cemetery
programme.desc: A young family moves from their cramped New York City apartment to a spacious new home in New England. But this is no ordinary house in the country: the previous owner was the deranged Dr. Freudstein, whose monstrous human experiments have left a legacy of bloody mayhem. Now, someone - or something - is alive in the basement, and home sweet home is about to become a horrific hell on earth.

programme.title: 13 Nights of Elvira
programme.desc: Elvira holiday gift to all of you is this awful lump of coal, straight off the naughty list. Gary Busey stars as the voice of this creepy cookie made from the ashes of a serial killer is a recipe for disaster in this creepy clas-sick

programme.title: Suicide Forest Village
programme.desc: From the Director of The Grudge comes a terrifying, supernatural tale inspired by an infamous Japanese forest known for its frequent suicides and disappearances. A group of unsuspecting friends stumble upon a mysterious box and a curse begins to spread. To break the curse, the group must venture to the source of the box deep within the Jukai Forest. Its said that the land holds a grudge against trespassers where once you enter, you have no hope of escaping with your life.

programme.title: The Changeling
programme.desc: After the death of his wife and daughter in a car crash, a music professor staying at a long-vacant Seattle mansion is dragged into a decades-old mystery by an inexplicable presence in the mansion's attic.

programme.title: Clovehitch Killer, The
programme.desc: A picture-perfect family is shattered when the work of a serial killer hits too close to home. Dylan McDermott stars in this chilling portrait of all-American evil.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins plays a ventriloquist whose dummy has a murderous mind of its own in this chilling psychological horror film written by legendary Hollywood scribe William Goldman.

programme.title: Last Ones Out
programme.desc: Waking from surgery, Henry finds himself alone, in the dark, and in a hospital that has been overrun by a horde of flesh-hungry zombies. Together with the last few survivors, Henry must find a path to safety.

programme.title: Blood Quantum
programme.desc: Blood Quantum

programme.title: Warning: Do Not Play
programme.desc: An aspiring director hunts down a film said to be shot... by a ghost. A SHUDDER ORIGINAL.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Rescues Pearl" - Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down. Jed didn't count on Mr. Brewster's background in the theater and him making a huge production out of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro Goes to School" - Jed enrolls Jethro at an exclusive Beverly Hills elementary school. Millicent Schuyler-Potts, the proprietor of the school, is aghast when Jed and Jethro show up, convinced this is part of some ghastly hoax. After Jed says that banker Milburn Drysdale is his neighbor, she calls the banker. It turns out that Drysdale's bank holds the mortgage on the school. Schulyer-Potts suddenly warms to the charms of the Clampetts, even if it means accepting Jethro as a fifth grader.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys Stock" - Grannie prepares her special mash to help cure Mrs. Drysdale of her drinking problem while Jed does as Mr. Drysdale suggests and buys stock: cows, goats, pigs, and chickens! Meanwhile, Mrs. Drysdale recovers from the shock of her first meeting with the Clampetts and is convinced she's imagining things.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Girl From Home" - A father and daughter from back home come to Beverly Hills to meet Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Giant Jackrabbit" - Granny encounters a kangaroo, and thinks she's found a giant jackrabbit, but no one will believe her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Garden Party" - Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake. They end up back by their 'cement pond' to handle the 'overflow' from Mrs. Drysdale's party. A gun shot by Granny starts the real party.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Great Feud" - Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

Roys most zestful musical adventure is about a worthless gold mine that turns out to have a hidden shaft filled with riches. programme.title: Richard Hammond brings an E46 BMW M3 to the Smallest Cog! Ft. @MatArmstrongbmx
programme.desc: We all love a future classic, and it doesn't get much better than the stunning BMW E46 M3. In this new series that we're kicking off, we invited YouTuber Mat Armstrong to the Smallest Cog to have his car checked over by Mike and Anthony, and have a chat with Richard. Here's how it went!

programme.title: Ferrari SF90 driven by Ex-Stig flat-out!
programme.desc: Believe it or not, Ben Collins – the old Stig – never got to drive a LaFerrari. So when we were thrown the keys to the brand new Ferrari SF90, we took it to Thruxton race track for the dayand handed it over to Ben. So... Does he like the electrification of the Italian brand?

programme.title: Richard Hammond has bought a seriously UNEXPECTED daily driver!
programme.desc: Nevermind a brand new supercar, it turns out Richard Hammond loves a van. And to help all the processes involved in running a classic car restoration workshop, Richard has bought the team a new Ford Transit, the quintessential piece of kit for such a job.

programme.title: We manual-swapped our V10 BMW M5 estate!
programme.desc: Our BMW M5 Touring has a phenomenal V10 engine spitting out 500hp. But it has always been slightly let down by its automated-manual gearbox. Mike sets out to sort that issue by taking the car to Everything M to have its gearbox changed to a six-speed manual out of an M3. A 500hp, V10, manual estate car? That sounds like one hell of a recipe!

programme.title: Richard Hammond welcomes the legendary Toyota Supra to The Smallest Cog! Ft. @Jimmy_Broadbent
programme.desc: We invite another YouTuber to The Smallest Cog to give their car a Cog Score, and this time it is channel-favourite Jimmy Broadbent and his rather battered Mk4 Toyota Supra. It may be a legendary car, but it could be in for a hammering from Mike and Anthony!

programme.title: Why are V10 engines completely gone from modern cars?
programme.desc: The V10 engine is all but gone from the car industry, but with the V8 and V12 still going strong, why has the V10 died? Mike Fernie takes the DriveTribe M5 Touring for a spin to investigate this mystery.

programme.title: V10 BMW M5 Touring Manual lap of the Nürburgring!
programme.desc: After taking our manual V10 estate to the Isle of Man for its first drive, Mike decided there was only one place to take it for one of its last drives on the DriveTribe channel. Mike straps in for a lap with Misha Charoudin – the YouTube King of the 'Ring – to experience the greatest circuit in the world in the M5.

programme.title: Driving The Last Car Richard Hammond Drove On Top Gear!
programme.desc: This MGB was the final car Richard Hammond ever got behind the wheel of on Top Gear. Now, he and the Smallest Cogs have turned it into a racecar, which Mike Fernie has been given the job of testing around the epic Llandow race circuit!

programme.title: How is Richard Hammond's classic car business doing after 2 years?
programme.desc: With 2023 coming to a close, Mike Fernie grabs Chief Cog Neil Greenhouse for a walkaround of Richard Hammond's workshop to discuss the cars inside and how the business is doing after its second year in business.

programme.title: Why Isn’t There A 7-Cylinder Engine?
programme.desc: We have single cylinder engines, twins, triples, four-pots, inline fives, straight-sixes, but then we start to skip some steps. We jump to V8s, V10s and V12s, even V- or W16s. It’s a question many of you probably have never even thought to ask, but now that you’ve clicked on this video, let’s talk about it – why is there no such thing as a 7-cylinder engine?

programme.title: £4000 MANUAL XKR Inspected By Jaguar!
programme.desc: After manual-swapping our Japanese imported Jaguar XKR, Mike takes the car back home to Jaguar HQ to have it inspected by the experts at the Jaguar Daimler Heritage Trust. Does it pass the test?

programme.title: Richard Hammond teaches his daughter how to rally a Subaru!
programme.desc: After a first taste of off-roading in a Ram TRX, Richard Hammond brings his daughter Izzy to a proper rally school to take her driving abilities to the next level.

programme.title: Transforming Richard Hammond's Subaru from The Grand Tour! | Project Martin Ep.1
programme.desc: Mike originally rescued the Subaru from a secret Grand Tour location, and now is the time to start bringing Richard's STI V-Limited back to its former best. First mission – getting the Martini wrap off!

programme.title: Richard Hammond welcomes a truly ICONIC car to his workshop!
programme.desc: We’re back with another Cog Score video, where Richard Hammond interviews a special guest whilst their car is put under scrutiny by Mike Fernie and Anthony Greenhouse from Richard Hammond's Workshop. This episode features the one and only AutoAlex (Alex Kersten) and his world-famous Mazda MX-5, Phil! While Alex Kersten is chatting with Richard Hammond upstairs, Mike and Anthony get the Miata MX5 up on the ramp to see how the car is holding up!

programme.title: What Makes this ‘Bugatti’ so Cheap?!
programme.desc: The Bugatti Veyron is one of the all-time great cars, but you get one, you're talking at least £1 million. So what if you could buy a car that looks identical to a Veyron, but it was 'only' £150,000? What makes this 'Bugatti' so cheap? Well it's fake! This fake Bugatti has an engine from an Audi RS6, a bespoke steel tube chassis, but a real Veyron windscreen! Is it worth it?!

programme.title: This ILLEGAL fluid could increase engine power by 100bhp!
programme.desc: Graphene nanofluids are currently being created by a company called Flexegraph, with the aim being to transform the efficiency of regular car coolant. With this pioneering technology currently being banned by the FIA, how long will it be before these game-changing fluids make it into the automotive world?

programme.title: Richard Hammond ROASTS YouTubers' cars! | Part 4
programme.desc: We're back with another Richard Hammond YouTuber roast! This time he rips apart the likes of Adam LZ, Tavarish, AutoAlex and Top Dead Center – there's absolutely zero mercy when Hammond is around!

programme.title: Was Clarkson Right About The Original Tesla Roadster?
programme.desc: The Tesla Roadster was the original Tesla, the start of Elon Musk's world-beating automotive company. But does it still stack up 15 years on? Was Jeremy Clarkson right in his original controversial review? Mike Fernie goes out in a £150,000 example to find out!

programme.title: Inside the Ex-Stig's MASSIVE private farm compound!
programme.desc: Join us for an exclusive look around the former Top Gear Stig's new Farm. Has Clarkson's Farm got some competition from the Ex Stig? Mike Fernie joins him for the day looking around and getting stuck in with a bit of work!

programme.title: Richard Hammond’s Grand Tour Subaru Impreza Is Broken!
programme.desc: Martin the Grand Tour Subaru Impreza has been Richard Hammond's pride and joy since we rescued it and built it into a 530bhp monster. But on a recent blast in the Welsh countryside, it's has sprung an issue that Richard needs checked by a specialist.

programme.title: Should We Buy a Military Vehicle for Collins Farm?!
programme.desc: We went vehicle shopping with Ex-Stig! After realising that Ex-Stig Ben Collins needed some serious upgrades to his farm machinery, Mike Fernie decided to take the him to Witham Specialist Vehicles, a site that once hosted Clarkson, Hammond and May when purchasing demolition vehicles on Top Gear.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Goes For One Last Drive
programme.desc: Our manual Jaguar XKR has done its time on the channel and Richard Hammond has decided to grab the keys for one last drive. What does he think of our Porsche-beating Jaaaag?

programme.title: End of the Road for Richard Hammond’s Grand Tour GT?
programme.desc: Having rescued Richard Hammond's Aston Martin DB9 from Mauritania, Mike and Maxwell have decided to get it up on a ramp to see just how badly damaged the V12 GT is. The theoretical bill at the end of it is CRAZY.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Ukraine and the wonderful capital city of Kyiv. Were here for the second time for the iconic truck pull World Championships! The reigning World champion Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland will defend his title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this episode, a final chance for our athletes to get vital world series ranking points on board to give them the best possible chance of success and an initial advantage at the finals. It's the last show before the world finals and the top 10 places are up for grabs, but who will they be?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkeys south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season. Here in the sunshine, well finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is - you could not ask for a better setting. Aivars Smaukstellis, the reigning world champion is defending his title, and two-time world champion Dainis Zageris is also here, but with a though competition, who will win?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: What a day ahead of us here in Alanya, just a handful of events to go before we find out who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League in 2021. These are the world finals, and all the big names are in the house. With just 3 events to go - who will take the crown of World Champion 2021 and be the STRONGEST?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are back, after a short break it feels like we never even left. We’re here in Vaasa - Finland kicking off 2022 new world series. If you are watching at home, just like these people, you’re in the right place. Because this is a special edition world record breaker. The only question left today, is to see how many new world records will be set so stay tuned.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they’re going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they’re all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let’s see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We’ve got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan’s Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We’re in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: The Irish Pub
programme.desc: The Irish Pub is a eulogy to the greatest institution in Irish society, the pub or more specifically the traditional Irish publicans who run them. The characters in this exceptionally endearing film all run and own pubs that have been in their families for generations and it is through their warmth, wit and wisdom that we gain an insight into the heart and soul of The Irish Pub.

The characters in this exceptionally endearing film all run and own pubs that have been in their families for generations and it is through their warmth, wit and wisdom that we gain an insight into the heart and soul of The Irish Pub.

programme.desc: With extraordinary cinematography filmed in Hawaii, Costa Rica, New England, the California Redwoods, the Rocky Mountains, the Olympic Rain Forest, the Pacific Coast, Bali and the Sacred Canyons of the Southwest you'll have a glimpse of some of the most unique, beautiful places in the world.

programme.title: Beautiful Costa Rica
programme.desc: Experience the magic of the Costa Rican Cloud Forest. Visit the Osa Peninsula, one of the most bio-diverse locations on Earth. Descend into the Monte Verde Cloud Forest and its life-giving mist.

programme.title: Wonderful Waterways

programme.title: The World's Most Beautiful Beaches

programme.title: Yosemite Magic
programme.desc: Yosemite is internationally recognized for its granite cliffs, waterfalls, clear streams, giant sequoia groves, lakes, mountains, glaciers, and biological diversity.

programme.title: Scenes from a Creek
programme.desc: Explore the roaring rapids and serene stillness of a lively creek. Observe rushing waters covering rocky dams as they continue down this most picturesque, meandering waterway.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Dharma's Digger - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Oh no! While digging deep at a top secret construction site, Dhama’s digger gets splashed with smelly sludge! Everyone says that Carl's Car Wash is the place to get all cleaned up, so Dharma skedaddles over to see how Carl can help. With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Dharma’s vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Dharma rolls out one happy customer, and ready to get back to work on the site that Carl is itching to see!

programme.title: Mr. Golden Sun - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mister Sun, Sun, Mr. Golden Sun...please shine down on me! It’s the Mr. Sun song from Super Simple Songs!

programme.title: Finny's First Sleepover - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: It’s Finny’s first sleepover and Finny is nervous to sleep at Myrtle the Turtle’s house. Throughout the night, Finny becomes more and more comfortable and after a spooky story, Finny becomes the bravest of everyone at the sleepover! Finny can't wait to do a sleepover again – but this time, at Finny’s house!

programme.title: When I Grow Up - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: What do you want to be when you grow up? Maybe a firefighter? Or an astronaut? Or maybe a dancer? Practice talking about jobs and careers with this super simple and super fun song, “When I Grow Up”.

programme.title: Enchanted Ice Cream - Super Simple
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Enchanted Ice Cream Sundaes! With a map in hand, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble search the orchard for the secret ingredient … and discover a fairy treehouse leading to an enchanted world! The Bumble Nums travel through the portal…but do they find the ingredient they’re looking for? And can they get it back to the kitchen in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Hello Hello! - Super Simple Puppets and more
programme.desc: Sing and dance along with the Super Simple Puppets to “Hello Hello!”! It’s a classic Super Simple action song for kids.

programme.title: Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are making an Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake but the secret ingredient is at the top of Mount Fruity Volcano! Can Humble, Grumble, and Stumble climb the volcano and get what they need before it blows? And can they do it in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Let's Go For A Drive! - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Get in on the fun and join Milo in his pretend car for a quick ride. Do you see the ducks crossing the road? How about people walking on the sidewalk? Wait, don't cross on a red light!

programme.title: The Pinocchio - Sing Along With Tobee - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Caitie made a fluffy bird marionette named Fifi! Fifi is full of jokes and Tobee can't stop laughing! Caitie knows another marionette who is just as silly as Fifi. It's Pinocchio! There's even a whole song about him called "The Pinocchio." After Caitie and Tobee sing and dance to the song, Fifi can't help but tell one last joke. And guess what? It quacks Tobee up!

programme.title: Little Billy's Skateboard - Carl's Car Wash and more
programme.desc: The Bubblegum Bandit pulls another bubblegum burglary and is about to escape when Officer Oona bursts his bubble! Moments later, little Billy skates right into the action and his skateboard becomes a gummy mess! Billy hurries to Carl’s Car Wash, but Carl won't clean his skateboard - it's a CAR wash, not a SKATEBOARD wash! Billy does some quick thinking...and his skateboard might just go through the car wash after all!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Steve's Street Sweeper - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Steve the Street Sweeper is cleaning the street when garbage splatters all over the side of his truck! He doesn't want a dirty truck, so Steve races to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Steve's vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Steve leaves one happy customer, and is ready to get back to sweeping rubbish.

programme.title: Down By The Bay - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see cat wearing a hat? How about a goat rowing a boat? Well you can in this video for the classic children’s song, Down By The Bay!

programme.title: Mr. Pig & Mr. Mouse Have A Mess On Their Hands - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mr. Mouse and Mr. Pig love making food and having their friends over to eat it. But afterwards, their house is a complete mess! It's so gross, they don't even want to drive their van home to clean up. How can Mr. Mouse and Mr. Pig share their love of food with their friends without cluttering their home? Mr. Monkey has a tasty idea! What is it? Watch and find out!

programme.title: Finny The Shark - Down In The Bay and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see a shark glowing in the dark? Did you ever see a stingray dancing at the ballet? Finny and Mama Shark are singing a rhyming song about all of their silly friends down in the bay! Sing along!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Donnie head for Montgomery, Alabama in America where they join a boy named Kevin and his Dad on Fathers' Day at a car factory to build a car! But the Super Wings need to save the car and the factory from total destruction. When a girl named Cynthia in Yaounde, Cameroon, asks for a toy train for her baby chimp to ride on, things get dodgy fast. Kimba, the chimp, takes off into the jungle.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Donnie head for Roros, Norway to deliver a dress that shoots pretend snow. It's for a girl named Alice who is starring in the play "The Snow Princess". But a snowstorm threatens to cancel the play! Jett and Paul head to Saint Gallen, Switzerland to deliver a gingerbread man costume. It's for a boy named Teri who wants to use it to cheer on his pet pig, Otto, in a pig race.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Mira fly to San Cristobal, Ecuador to deliver super strong bubble solution. It's for a boy who wants to blow super strong bubbles that will last and last. But the bubbles trap sea animals and float them away! When a girl named Sylviya asks for a special watering can for her flowers, Jett and Dizzy head to Bulgaria. This leads to an encounter with bees and a new Super Wing named Bucky.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young boy named Gio asks the Super Wings to build him a special suit to wear to the local Mud Festival that will protect him from getting muddy. When the suit goes haywire Jett and the Super Wings come to the rescue. A young boy in Denmark orders egg capsules to hold three baby "block" dinosaurs he invented. But the eggs hatch early and imprint on Jett.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy in the Australian Outback wants to see a U.F.O. and meet an alien. He orders a mini satellite which unexpectedly leads to a rescue mission. Jett and Mira fly to Amphawa, Thailand, and deliver an enormous cake to a boy named Phra. They transport the cake on a raft through a floating market, but its fruit toppings attract the attention of some hungry Thai wildlife.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl who lives in the Netherlands asks for a tiny dress, a 'Dream Dress". When Jett and Bucky arrive, Nina tells them that she hopes it won't get taken, as a lot of things have been disappearing from her doll house lately. A girl on Easter Island asks for giant propeller caps for the Moai statues near her home. But the wind picks up and turns the Moai into head-helicopters.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A Scottish boy named Rooney asks the Super Wings to create a special mega-sized soccer uniform for his friend Jack, who is a tractor. Jack needs the uniform for an upcoming match of Tractor Soccer. A boy in Hawaii orders a special vacuum to clean up the garbage he's found in a bay where he rescued a young sea turtle. Before releasing the turtle, they discover a massive garbage island.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett's friend from Japan, Namiko, orders enormous sheets of origami paper. She and her friends use them for the Paper Rangers fan convention. But an animatronic of Paper Rangers' enemy Drac the Ripper goes haywire. Jett and Donnie deliver special tires to a boy named Gaspard in the Gobi Desert. Enjo gets overconfident with the new tires and accidentally startles some sheep.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: World Aircraft is flying through the Himalayas when an order comes in from a house near Mt Everest. Jett and Dizzy are sent to deliver some mega-sized art supplies to two brothers who want to make a mega-sized "Good Luck" card for their Dad. He's about to climb Mt. Everest! But when World Aircraft gets into trouble and crashes, it's going to take more than a Supercharge to save it!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl in Bogota asks for a spray-painting drone. When her jealous little dog steals the controls causing the drone to paint the town, they must get it back before he makes a huge mess. Jett and Donnie travel to Germany to bring a long wig to a girl named Kirsten. She wants to dress up as the famous princess, Rapunzel. Kirsten learns that it takes more than a wig to be a princess.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl in Switzerland orders an early release copy of a new book by a teenage adventure author. Discovering that the last chapter is missing, the Super Wings help her find the author. A boy named Pavel whose hobby is repairing watches, orders a special Super Wings wristwatch. Pavel takes them to see the Astronomy Clock in the Old Town Square, but they discover the old clock has stopped.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a boy and his grandmother board a luxury train in South Africa with self-inflating balloons, some animals cause the balloons to inflate, sending the train up into the sky. A girl named Kate from Bunbury, Australia, asks for a scanner that can go underwater. Jett and Mira learn that Kate needs it to analyze her favorite dolphin, Ninotchka. But Ninotchaka takes off after an undersea earthquake.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: On Halloween, a boy in California orders his own fully-functional Super Wings costume. But a haunted house scares Donnie haywire and he gets a giant pumpkin decoration stuck on his head! Jett and Paul fly to Cairo, where a girl has ordered a special item to help her lead a tour of the Cairo Museum for her friends. But the girl's little brother accidentally brings the mummies and sphinx to life!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Two boys who are pals that live in Greece, are huge mythology fans. They ask for a card game with mythological creatures that are holograms. When the creatures get too big, they threaten to destroy a town. A boy who loves everything about wizards wants to be a real wizard with a real magic wand. The closest Storm can come to making one is a toy wand with some Supercharge energy stored in it.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl in Moscow with a rock collection orders a special box with compartments labeled for the coolest rocks ever. When she discovers that her collection doesn't have the last three rocks needed to complete the box, the Superwings must help her get them by going on a trip into space, because the rocks needed are space rocks!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A Dad in Brazil orders a special explorer's outfit for his son. A huge wave rushes up the Amazon River and threatens the river animals and a village. A girl living in Dezhou China, is excited that she and her parents are hosting the Chinese New Year celebrations for the whole family. But traffic jams on land, sea, and air cause trouble for all the family members from other provinces.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl, Akaja, asks the Super Wings for molds that can make multi-colored ice blocks. She wants the blocks to build an igloo that holds a playground that holds a playground. A boy named Nuno in Porto, Portugal orders a large, clear, unbreakable bottle. He wants to build a model boat in a bottle. When the SWs and he shrink down to build the boat, the bottle is accidentally knocked out of a window.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl in Kuala Lumpur orders a special swing for the new baby orangutan to play on. But a mishap makes the orangutan become king-sized and it escapes from the zoo. A girl in Mexico named Daniela orders some cat treats shaped like marigolds. Jett and Astra learn that Daniela wants to use the treats to attract the attention of her recently deceased cat, Sanchez, for 'Day of The Dead.'

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet Cats, Dogs, Birds, Bugs and Woodland Creatures! Learn simple words through narration and repetition. Meet all sorts of creatures from domestic kittens to jungle cats, puppies, big and small birds, butterflies, lady bugs, otters and deer!! See whimsical toys and puppets.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating animals from across the globe! Dance and sing along with puppets and discover some of the world's most unique creatures. Join us to dance along to classical melodies as we learn animal names through narration and repetition or simply enjoy seeing live-action footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Hop aboard to see vehicles that travel by land, water and sky! See real-life images of cars, boats and planes in this on-the-go adventure that features cameos from some of your favorite Baby Einstein characters, all while listening to music from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Enjoy the best of summer, autumn and winter with Baby Einstein! Discover the familiar sights and sounds of the different seasons. Learn names of common objects associated with each through repetition and narration and see engaging images of whimsical toys that celebrate each. Discover the magic of each season from falling leaves, rolling beach balls and even snowmen.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: One of the greatest joys you'll ever experience is bonding with your baby during those calm, quiet moments. Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby provides comforting sights and sounds as you relax and share this precious downtime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Fireplace Meditation Relaxation Sound
programme.desc: Relax with the crackling sound of a fireplace. This calming video will help you relax into a deep sleep.

programme.title: Wheels on the bus Nursery Rhyme and Kids Songs - Bob The Train
programme.desc: Enjoy Bob the Train's nursery rhymes which children love. Learn songs and new words at the same time.

programme.title: Car Wash for Children - Kids Channel
programme.desc: The most popular car wash videos all in one place! This compilation features a wide number of vehicles!

programme.title: Wheels on The Firetruck + More Nursery Rhymes for Kids - Boom Buddies
programme.desc: Enjoy Boom Buddies nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers, including Baby Shark, Fruits Song, and more!

programme.title: Top 50 Nursery Rhymes Collection - Kids TV
programme.desc: Enjoy the Top 50 nursery rhymes by Kids TV. Babies will learn preschool songs with their favorite characters.

programme.title: Wheels on The Firetruck & More Kids Songs - Junior Squad
programme.desc: Sing & dance along to Wheels on The Firetruck! Enjoy popular songs for toddlers featuring the Junior Squad!

programme.title: Old MacDonald Had a Farm + More Kids Songs - Farmees
programme.desc: Sing along to Old Macdonald Had A Farm! With the Farmees, learn songs like Humpty Dumpty and many more!

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic outsmarts Coconuts, then stumbles into a Convention of Bounty Hunter Robots where Robotnik puts a price on his head. After Sonic defeats all the Robot Bounty Hunters, Robotnik creates Scratch and Grounder to be his S.S.S.S.S. Squad.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic saves a damsel in distress, and falls in love with her, not knowing she's a robot built by Robotnik. But when she has a chance to trap him, she helps him escape, realizing she has fallen for him.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Scratch and Grounder use Robotnik's new Slo-Mo Ray Gun to capture Sonic, Tails rescues him by reversing the gun and turning it on a tribe of friendly Tree Sloth People who become a high speed commando strike force against Robotnik.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails and other Mobius citizens are lured into Robotnik's robotic games of chance, and when they lose they're sent to slave labor camps. Sonic rescues Tails and the others by beating the house in games of chance at Robotnik's Casino.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Tails gets trapped in the "Warp of Confusion" (an Escher-like world of another dimension) by Robotnik's cousin, Dr. Warpnik, Sonic comes to the rescue and traps Robotnik and his badniks in the warp.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his "brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer" to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver).

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic rescues Lucas, a rival of Robotnik's, from Robotnik's dungeons. But Robotnik will do anything to keep Lucas from finding his lost love, Lucinda, including proposing to her himself.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When an undersea world is threatened by Captain Memo and his lobster sub, Sonic spreads a rumor that Memo plans to attack Robotnik next.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation, his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik launches a spy-orb that will uncover the Freedom Fighter's Knothole location, Sonic and Robot launch themselves up to the orbiting spy-sphere aboard a home-made rocket powered by Robotnik's discarded booster engine.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic and The Freedom Fighters take out Robotnik's main computer, they're trapped by Swat-Bots in an underground tunnel, only to be rescued by a handsome teenager named Griff. Griff takes them deep beneath the Big City.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huck turn the Baby Berrykins' favorite fairy tale, "The Littlest Berrykin," into a comedy play. They pitch it to director Plum and the assembled cast and crew using a large storybook. As Huck and Blueberry narrate the story, we push in on the book and its illustrations transition into animation. In the story, the King and Queen of the Berry Patch (played by Huck and Blueberry) are retiring to the tropics.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Orange wants to spend the day teaching her puppy to fetch, but the frisky little gal doesn't seem to understand the "retrieve" part of the activity-as soon as she gets the ball, she runs out of sight and returns moments later without it. Orange gets a new ball and tries again, with the same results. Over and over, until Orange is out of balls. Puzzled and frustrated that she can't find where her pup has stashed them, she goes to enlist her friends to help her search.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With the power completely out in Berry Bitty City, the girls go on a camping trip to be out of the way of the Berrykin work crews. Lemon is nervous because she believes there is a creepy creature in the forest (that she read about in a book Blueberry loaned her), and the girls get the nervous bug, but Strawberry turns their apprehension into fun by daring her friends to stay out in the woods the longest!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls are driven to distraction by their frisky puppies frolicking all over Berry Bitty City! Full of energy and thinking that everything in town is a toy for them to play with, they cause comical mayhem wherever they go. Strawberry suggests the pups need a place of their own where they can play, a dog park! The girls decide to call in Huckleberry, who runs an animal hotel in Berry Big City, to help design the park.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls plan a formal afternoon lawn party tea to inaugurate their new dog park. Plum is in charge of decorations, Cherry music, and Strawberry snacks. There's even a giant, dog-shaped ice sculpture. As the girls get dressed, Raspberry puts the finishing touches on the high-fashion hats that will accompany their beautiful gowns. At last everything is ready. But when the gate opens... the puppies back away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: To convince the dance-averse Huckleberry to attend the big masquerade ball at the dog park, Blueberry promises she'll stay by his side the whole evening and make sure he doesn't have to dance. But as the day of the ball dawns, Blueberry awakens with a bad cold. She doesn't know how to tell Huck that she can't go to the ball. Lemon and Raspberry misinterpret her sniffles, thinking she's so heartbroken to be disappointing Huck that she's crying!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is abuzz as Berrykin Bloom introduces the biggest, juiciest, strangest fruit anyone has ever seen! It's the size of a house, shaped like a strawberry, colored like a watermelon and has a spiky pineapple top. "I call it the sparklestrawwaterpineberry!" says Berrykin Bloom. Princess Berrykin declares it the greatest achievement in Berryculture she's ever witnessed.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Friends from all over the world descend on Strawberryland to take part in the first Great Friendship Festival. Strawberry thinks the festival will provide a wonderful opportunity to see the world through different eyes.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is excitedly making their way through the berry batch in search of the elusive Wanderberry. It is to be the dessert at the BerryFest Feast. Everyone is milling about searching for it on their own when Blueberry points out that the rules say the BerryFest Princess is in charge of the search. The girls turn to her for direction and she points them where she thinks the berry might be.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One night, as Strawberry & Friends gaze at the stars, they talk about what they want to be when they grow up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: It's that time of year when the berries are about to burst into bloom - and it looks like this is going to be a bumper crop! Strawberry decides to celebrate the event with a first-ever Berry Big Berry Blossom Festival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls plan a formal afternoon lawn party tea to inaugurate their new dog park. Plum is in charge of decorations, Cherry music, and Strawberry snacks. There's even a giant, dog-shaped ice sculpture. As the girls get dressed, Raspberry puts the finishing touches on the high-fashion hats that will accompany their beautiful gowns. At last everything is ready. But when the gate opens... the puppies back away!
